Command_En: Make a very bored face like Emma!
Command_Zh: 做一個像 Emma 一樣覺得超級無聊的表情！

Command_En: Pretend to throw a beach ball to someone!
Command_Zh: 假裝用力丟出一顆海灘球！

Command_En: Say 'Sorry!' loudly like the little boy.
Command_Zh: 像小男孩一樣，大聲地說 'Sorry!'

Command_En: Pretend to hit a beach ball with your head!
Command_Zh: 假裝用頭頂一顆海灘球！

Command_En: Point to someone and say 'What do you want?'
Command_Zh: 指著某人說 'What do you want?'

Command_En: Say 'I am the son of a pirate!' with a pirate voice! Arrr!
Command_Zh: 用海盜的聲音說 'I am the son of a pirate!' Arrr!

Command_En: Stand up and pretend to look for treasure using a telescope.
Command_Zh: 站起來，假裝拿著望遠鏡四處尋找寶藏！

Command_En: Laugh loudly like Emma did.
Command_Zh: 像 Emma 一樣大聲笑出來！

Command_En: Look far away like you are searching for an island!
Command_Zh: 看向遠方，就像你在尋找一座島嶼一樣！

Command_En: Stand up quickly and say 'OK!'
Command_Zh: 快速站起來並說 'OK!'

Command_En: Point at something BLUE in your room, just like the blue glove!
Command_Zh: 快指著你房間裡一個「藍色」的東西，就像那隻藍色手套一樣！

Command_En: Pretend to put on an old pair of glasses and look around.
Command_Zh: 假裝戴上一副舊眼鏡，然後四處看看。

Command_En: Pretend to pick up a wet glove and put it in a big bag.
Command_Zh: 假裝撿起一隻濕答答的手套，把它塞進肩膀上的大包包裡。

Command_En: Pretend to put a wet glove into a big bag!
Command_Zh: 假裝把一隻濕手套放進一個大袋子裡！

Command_En: Look down and point to some glasses!
Command_Zh: 往下看並指著一副眼鏡！

Command_En: Make an angry fish face and show your teeth!
Command_Zh: 做一個露出牙齒的「生氣魚」表情！

Command_En: Use your hands to make crab claws and snap them twice! Snap! Snap!
Command_Zh: 用你的雙手做出螃蟹的螯，然後用力夾兩下！

Command_En: Whisper 'It's dangerous here' as quietly as you can.
Command_Zh: 用最小的聲音，悄悄地說 'It's dangerous here'。

Command_En: Pretend to be a fish with very big teeth!
Command_Zh: 假裝是一隻有著大牙齒的魚！

Command_En: Put your bag down on a rock!
Command_Zh: 把你的袋子放在石頭上！

Command_En: Say 'I'm not afraid!' very bravely.
Command_Zh: 挺起胸膛，非常勇敢地說 'I'm not afraid!'

Command_En: Pretend to put a glove on your hand and reach into deep water.
Command_Zh: 假裝把手套戴上，然後把手伸進深深的水裡。

Command_En: Pretend to hook a ring using a fork. You got it!
Command_Zh: 假裝用叉子小心地勾起一枚戒指。你抓到了！

Command_En: Pretend to hook a ring out of the water!
Command_Zh: 假裝從水裡勾出一枚戒指！

Command_En: Wave goodbye to the pirate ship!
Command_Zh: 向海盜船揮手說再見！

Command_En: Look up and look very surprised, like Emma!
Command_Zh: 抬起頭，露出非常驚訝的表情，就像 Emma 發現男孩不見時一樣！

Command_En: Pretend to open your hand to show a beautiful gold ring.
Command_Zh: 假裝慢慢打開你的手，展示裡面有一枚美麗的金戒指。

Command_En: Make a very sad face like Emma's mother.
Command_Zh: 做一個像 Emma 媽媽一樣非常難過的表情。

Command_En: Wave goodbye to the pirate ship!
Command_Zh: 開心地向遠方的海盜船揮手說再見！

Command_En: Look out of an imaginary window and smile.
Command_Zh: 看著一扇想像中的窗戶，然後給一個大大的微笑。
